creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hm, I'm not sure about this.  First, the usual use case for this is for home directories, as explained here: http://www.c0t0d0s0.org/archives/4120-Less-known-Solaris-Features-exporthome-home-autofs.html.  This means we can't built it into special_hosts; it would need to be in either the automountd.c, or perhaps in mount_nfs(8).

Second, I'm not sure if we actually _want_ to do this at all.  A lot has changed
since SPARCstations; does this optimization still actually do any measurable difference in performance on todays hardware, with todays desktops?
